translation.literal_translation: If one objects 'word (would be contradictory),' no: because (the world) arises from that, as known by perception and inference. (28)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.3.28: shabda-virodha is denied by scriptural and inferential support for word-prior manifestation.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra compression of the semantic objection and rebuttal.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S03 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit technical choices around sphota/varna vocabulary in records 1.3.068 and 1.3.069.
